name: evidence-and-trust
forbiddenClaims: invented telemetry presented as source-system fact
expected outcome presented as proven value
AI confidence presented as source strength
partial visibility presented as complete asset knowledge
internal proof presented as customer-ready proof without validation
generic benchmark presented without source scope
recommendation presented as validated without human validation

labelingRules.expectedOutcome: Label as expected, estimated or illustrative. Do not label as proven.
labelingRules.partialVisibility: Show scope limits and known unknowns.
labelingRules.aiGeneratedInterpretation: Show observable facts before AI interpretation.
labelingRules.customerReadyClaim: Require customer readiness, validation status and proof readiness.
labelingRules.humanValidation: Use not-required, recommended or required. Do not hide required validation in prose.
labelingRules.deprecatedAliases: Deprecated aliases may be accepted by TypeScript for compatibility, but new documentation must prefer canonical hyphenated values.
